get.description: Get the data of a list

owner.description: The user ID in Wekan. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

isActive.description: Whether to set the board active

isAdmin.description: Whether to set the owner an admin of the board

isWorker.description: Whether to only move cards, assign himself to card and comment

assignees.description: The new list of assignee IDs attached to the card. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

description.description: The new description of the card

members.description: The new list of member IDs attached to the card. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

boardId.description: ID of the board where the lists are in. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

IdUser.description: The ID of the user that boards are attached. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

listId.description: The ID of the list to get

swimlaneId.description: The ID of the swimlane that card belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

authorId.description: The user who posted the comment. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

cardId.description: The ID of the card that checklistItem belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

authorId.description: Update the owner of the card. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

assignees.description: The new list of assignee IDs attached to the card. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

color.description: The new color of the card

description.description: The new description of the card

dueAt.description: The new due at field of the card

endAt.description: The new end at field of the card

labelIds.description: The label IDs attached to the card

listId.description: The new list ID of the card (move operation). Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

members.description: The new list of member IDs attached to the card. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

isOverTime.description: The new over time field of the card

parentId.description: The parent of the card. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

receivedAt.description: The new received at field of the card

sort.description: The internally used sort value of a card

spentTime.description: The new spent time field of the card

startAt.description: The new start at field of the card

swimlaneId.description: The new swimlane ID of the card. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

title.description: The new title for the checklistItem item

commentId.description: The ID of the comment to get

items.description: Items to be added to the checklist

checklistId.description: The ID of the checklistItem that card belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

checklistItemId.description: The ID of the checklistItem item to update. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.
